steps.title: Use the rectangle area formula
steps.content: The area of a rectangle is length times width. Here, the length is $72$ inches and the width is $28$ inches.

steps.title: Identify the area formula and given values
steps.content: The area of a rectangle is found by multiplying length times width. We are given: length = 72 inches and width = 28 inches.

steps.title: Calculate the area by multiplication
steps.content: Substitute the values into the formula: $$A = 72 \times 28 = 2016$$ The area of the rectangle is 2016 square inches.
